name: think-it-through
description: The first thinking deck built on the Human-Agent Card Protocol, with 14 conversation cards for developing complex ideas with AI.

interface.shortDescription: Think freely. The agent follows your lead.
interface.longDescription: The first thinking deck built on HACP. Fourteen conversation cards give each turn an explicit effect, useful default, duration, flow, and result without imposing a workflow.
defaultPrompt: $think-it-through:think-help Help me choose how to continue this conversation.
$think-it-through:think-recap Recover the full shape of this conversation.
$think-it-through:think-to-brief Turn this thinking into a reusable brief.
